Title: CLUSTERED
Feature: CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX index_name ON table_name (column_list)
CREATE TEXT INDEX ON table_name (column) ... CLUSTERED WITH (cluster_columns)
Description: In CREATE INDEX, CLUSTERED specifies that table rows are stored in index order for the given key, affecting physical layout and access patterns.
For text indexes, CLUSTERED WITH allows clustering of the words table entries according to additional columns, improving locality for certain queries.
Examples: CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_article_pub ON article (pub_date, id);

CREATE TEXT INDEX ON article (description)
  WITH KEY dtid CLUSTERED WITH (pub_date, author_name);
